equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: the audited v2 port has LLM error-fee handling, but the DA delivery hasError constant-fee path and DA compile-time bound are absent.

checked_queries: hasError Image Audio Video FHE Phase 2 constant fee
DA error settlement fees bounded compile time
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The port defines and compile-time-bounds LLM_ERROR_EXECUTOR_FEE_WEI, but does not define DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI or assert it is bounded by image/audio/video Phase 1 fees.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-async-fees/src/constants.rs defines LLM_ERROR_EXECUTOR_FEE_WEI and one compile-time assertion, but no DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI or multimodal/FHE bound assertion.
crates/ritual-async-fees/src/lib.rs calculates normal ZK, persistent-agent, audio, video, and agent Phase 2 fees, but has no delivery_has_error or calculate_da_error_fees_phase2 symbol.

crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs and crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs route audio/video deliveries through normal extraction and fee calculation without a hasError short-circuit.
The old /home/ritual/repos/ritual-reth-internal checkout contains delivery_has_error/calculate_da_error_fees_phase2, but it is not one of the audited local repos for this port batch.

notes: Searches across all audited repos found only the LLM has_error path; DA hasError handling appears only in the non-audited older checkout.
rationale: The primary diff adds `const _: () = assert!(...)` guards for both fee inequalities, making the pricing assumptions compile-time invariants. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: `LLM_ERROR_EXECUTOR_FEE_WEI` must not exceed `HTTP_EXECUTOR_BASE_FEE_WEI`, and `DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI` must not exceed any image, audio, or video Phase 1 settlement fee; violating either relation must fail compilation.
suggested_falsification_tests: Temporarily set `LLM_ERROR_EXECUTOR_FEE_WEI` above `HTTP_EXECUTOR_BASE_FEE_WEI` or set `DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI` above any multimodal Phase 1 settlement fee and assert the crate fails to compile; restore valid values and assert compilation succeeds.
summary: DA error settlement compile-time fee bounds are absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Temporarily add or mutate DA_ERROR_PHASE2_FEE_WEI above image/audio/video Phase 1 fee values and assert compilation fails; current code has no DA error constant or compile-time assertion to exercise.
title: Error settlement fees are bounded at compile time
